meta.purpose: Examples that show judgment structure rather than scripts.
meta.load_condition: Load when examples, transformation patterns, or before/after critique are needed.

cases.brief: A product has 40 components each with inline animation values.
cases.bad_pattern: Each component defines its own duration, easing, and keyframes. When the brand changes the feel, all 40 components must be updated manually.
cases.master_pattern: Extract duration and easing into CSS custom properties or JS tokens. Build 5-8 motion primitives (fade-in, slide-up, scale-reveal, pulse, shake). Migrate components to reference primitives. Updating the brand feel now requires changing only the token definitions.

cases.brief: Motion decisions are made in Figma and handed off as annotated mockups.
cases.bad_pattern: Designers specify 'ease out 300ms' in Figma annotations. Engineers interpret differently or copy-paste from other components. Motion becomes inconsistent within weeks.
cases.master_pattern: Build a Storybook page with all motion primitives as interactive examples. Designers review the live primitives, not static annotations. Both roles reference the same token names during handoff.
